subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #082 The Unity of Existence
subcodes.first_line: Know that the idea of the unity of existence is ancient and is not restricted to the Theosophists and the Sufis alone.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدانکه این مسألهٴ وحدة الوجود قدیم است تخصیص بثیاسفه و صوفیه ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
